opportunities.label: Online Scheduling Automation
opportunities.signal: Phone-only contact with no booking tools detected on site or GMB.
opportunities.observation: Boise-area HVAC leads calling after hours go straight to competitors with online booking.
opportunities.fix: Deploy AI chat widget enabling 24/7 appointment booking without requiring a phone call.

opportunities.label: Maintenance Reminder Automation
opportunities.signal: No email marketing tools detected and no recurring revenue signals on site.
opportunities.observation: With 312 reviews, Diamond has a large customer base generating zero automated seasonal revenue.
opportunities.fix: Build AI-driven seasonal reminder sequences targeting past customers before Boise heating and cooling seasons.

opportunities.label: Call Capture CRM Automation
opportunities.signal: No CRM or marketing tools detected; phone-only contact is the sole inbound channel.
opportunities.observation: Every unbooked or missed call from Treasure Valley prospects disappears with no follow-up possible.
opportunities.fix: Integrate AI call capture and CRM logging to record, transcribe, and auto-follow-up every inbound call.
